detections.name: Lucide Proxy exact multi-scope selector scan
detections.telemetry: local repository and exported dependency/deployment/browser/network telemetry
detections.positive_signal: one or more embedded incident selectors
detections.false_positives: generic package names and shared advertising/CDN infrastructure require context
maps_to_iocs: all package/version pairs, hashes, precise network selectors

detections.name: Chromium history/service-worker evidence
detections.positive_signal: campaign URL/domain/identifier/hash in history or stored browser artifact
